title: Assessment and evidence of the relationship between farmer well-being, and their animal welfare: protocol of a One Welfare scoping review
author: Levallois, Pierre
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Protocol for a scoping review. The aim of this upload was to have a record, to refer to the protocol in a future publication. The upload also allowed to prove that the protocol was designed before starting the study.
steps_raw: Protocol for a scoping review. The aim of this upload was to have a record, to refer to the protocol in a future publication. The upload also allowed to prove that the protocol was designed before starting the study.
